title: ilex tounkiniana
intro: Ilex tounkiniana, also known as the Vietnamese evergreen holly, is a plant species that belongs to the Aquifoliaceae family. The leaves and branches of Ilex tounkiniana have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. This plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, including coughs and bronchitis. Ilex tounkiniana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
